# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi job Workflow
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
 build-artifact-job:
   runs-on: ubuntu-latest
   steps:
     - name: Checkout source code
       uses: actions/checkout@v2
     - name: Generate artifact
       run: |
         echo "##[set-output name=version;]"
         echo "$(git log --pretty=format:'%h' -n 1)" > version.txt
         echo "Version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
 deploy-artifact-job:
   runs-on: ubuntu-latest
   needs: [build-artifact]
   steps:
     - name: Checkout source code
       uses: actions/checkout@v2
     - name: Download artifact
       uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@master 
       with:
         workflow_conclusion: success
deploy-job:
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build-artifact, deploy-artifact] 
  steps:
    - name: Checkout source code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2 
    - name: Download artifact
      uses: dawidd6/action-download-artifact@master 
      with:
        workflow_conclusion: success
